summary: Completed testing of Geography and Scientific Template upgrades (iteration 10). Both specialized template editors are working correctly with proper layouts, image uploads, and all interactive elements.
passed_tests: Geography Template opens when clicking Geography card in Templates grid
Geography Template has 4 image upload cards in a grid (geo-image-card-0..3)
Geography Template image upload cards are clickable with proper data-testid
Geography Template has questions section with Q1, Q2, Q3 by default
Geography Template Add Question button adds a new question textarea (Q4)
Geography Template remove question button works (removes Q4 when clicked)
Geography Template back button returns to template grid
Geography Template Save button works - shows toast 'Template saved!'
Geography Template Export DOCX button is present and functional
Geography Template has purple accent theme (#7C3AED)
Geography Template Premium badge shown in header
Scientific Template opens when clicking Scientific card in Templates grid
Scientific Template has vertical split layout (flex display)
Scientific Template notes textarea is on the left side (58% width)
Scientific Template has 3 image upload cards on the right side (42% width)
Scientific Template image upload cards have proper data-testid (sci-image-card-0..2)
Scientific Template notes textarea accepts input (scientific-content-textarea)
Scientific Template Save button works - shows toast 'Template saved!'
Scientific Template Export DOCX button is present and functional
Scientific Template back button returns to template grid
Scientific Template has green accent theme (#059669)
Mathematics Template still opens MathTemplate editor (regression)
Physics Template still opens PhysicsTemplate editor (regression)
Chemistry Template still opens ChemistryTemplate editor (regression)
Basic Template still opens generic TemplateEditor (regression)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user session and templates from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Geography and Scientific templates now have specialized editors. Geography has 4 image upload cards in a grid + questions section with add/remove functionality. Scientific has vertical split layout with notes textarea on left (58%) and 3 image upload cards on right (42%). Both use Sonner toast notifications for save confirmation. Math/Physics/Chemistry templates continue to work with their specialized keyboard editors. Basic template still uses generic TemplateEditor. PesaPal payments remain MOCKED.

geography_template_editor.details: GeographyTemplate opens with 4 image upload cards in grid layout, questions section with Q1/Q2/Q3 default, Add Question button, remove question buttons, purple accent theme (#7C3AED), Premium badge

geography_image_upload_cards.details: 4 image cards with data-testid geo-image-card-0..3, click to upload functionality, proper hover states

geography_questions_section.details: 3 default questions (Q1, Q2, Q3), Add Question button adds Q4, remove button removes questions, question badges with purple gradient

geography_save_export.details: Save button shows 'Template saved!' toast and changes to 'Saved!' state, Export DOCX button present

scientific_template_editor.details: ScientificTemplate opens with vertical split layout, green accent theme (#059669)

scientific_split_layout.details: Flex container with notes side (58%) on left and images side (42%) on right

scientific_notes_textarea.details: Notes textarea with data-testid scientific-content-textarea, accepts input, monospace font

scientific_image_upload_cards.details: 3 image cards with data-testid sci-image-card-0..2, stacked vertically on right side

scientific_save_export.details: Save button shows 'Template saved!' toast and changes to 'Saved!' state, Export DOCX button present

back_button_navigation.details: Back button (editor-back) in both Geography and Scientific editors returns to templates grid

regression_math_physics_chemistry.details: Math/Physics/Chemistry templates still open their specialized keyboard editors

regression_basic_template.details: Basic template still opens generic TemplateEditor with contentEditable body

geography_template.image_grid: CSS grid with 4 columns, 14px gap, proper hover states with purple border
geography_template.questions_section: Flex column layout, question badges with purple gradient, proper spacing
geography_template.padding: 20px section padding, consistent with app design

scientific_template.notes_side: Monospace font, full height textarea, clean border
scientific_template.images_side: Stacked image cards with green hover accent
